column1: # One access token per line. Each MUST belong to a DISTINCT >= T2 account
# filing a report is T2-gated (ReportController @RequiresTier("T2")). A fresh T1
# signup CANNOT file — so do NOT put T1 tokens here.
# Lines starting with '#' and blank lines are ignored.
# Generate these with the seeding step (see perf/README.md "Seeding"):
#     write each account's access token on its own line.
# Copy this file to citizen-tokens.csv (gitignored) and fill it with REAL tokens.
# NEVER commit real tokens (CLAUDE.md §12: no secrets in source).
